components.label: Current Architecture Assessment
components.description: Evaluate the existing monolithic architecture, including its components, dependencies, and performance metrics.

components.label: Microservices Benefits Analysis
components.description: Identify and analyze the potential benefits of migrating to a microservices architecture, such as scalability, maintainability, and deployment speed.

components.label: Migration Challenges Identification
components.description: Identify potential challenges and risks associated with the migration process, including technical, organizational, and operational hurdles.

components.label: Technology Stack Evaluation
components.description: Assess the technology stack required for the microservices architecture, including programming languages, frameworks, and tools.

components.label: Implementation Strategy Development
components.description: Develop a detailed strategy for implementing the migration, including timelines, resource allocation, and phased rollout plans.

components.label: Success Metrics Definition
components.description: Define metrics and KPIs to measure the success of the migration and the performance of the new microservices architecture.
